prompt: A highly realistic, cinematic photograph of a {argument name="subject description" default="young Asian woman"} wearing {argument name="clothing" default="traditional black and white Hanfu"}, sitting at a dark wooden desk in a dimly lit traditional study. She holds a calligraphy brush in her right hand, poised over a blank scroll, while resting her chin on her left hand with a {argument name="expression" default="thoughtful and contemplative"} look directed toward a lattice window on the right. The background features a large wall hanging covered in {argument name="background calligraphy" default="traditional Chinese calligraphy"}. The scene is illuminated by {argument name="lighting style" default="dramatic cinematic lighting with warm and cool contrast"}, featuring a warm glow from a traditional paper lantern on the left and cool natural light streaming from the window. The desk is adorned with an inkstone, a blue and white porcelain brush holder, and a small potted plant, creating a rich, moody atmosphere with exquisite textures.
translatedPrompt: 一张极具写实感、电影质感的照片，画面中 {argument name="subject description" default="一位年轻的亚洲女性"} 身着 {argument name="clothing" default="传统的黑白汉服"}，坐在一间光线昏暗的传统书房的深色木桌前。她右手握着一支毛笔，悬于空白卷轴之上，左手托腮，神情 {argument name="expression" default="沉思且专注"} 地望向右侧的格栅窗。背景是一面挂满 {argument name="background calligraphy" default="传统中国书法"} 的大墙。场景由 {argument name="lighting style" default="具有冷暖对比的戏剧性电影光效"} 照亮，左侧的传统纸灯笼散发出温暖的光芒，而窗外射入冷色调的自然光。桌上摆放着砚台、青花瓷笔架和一盆小绿植，营造出一种质感精致、氛围浓郁的意境。

breakdown.creativeCore: 电影感书法肖像：生成一张极具写实感、氛围浓郁的肖像，展现人物身着传统服饰在古典书房中练习书法的场景。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: natural light]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
